testsuite.name: getProfilesDir — re-reads env var on every call

testcase.name: returns default ~/.orager/profiles when env var is not set
testcase.classname: getProfilesDir — re-reads env var on every call

testcase.name: returns the custom dir when ORAGER_PROFILES_DIR is set
testcase.classname: getProfilesDir — re-reads env var on every call

testcase.name: reflects a mid-test env change immediately (no module-level cache)
testcase.classname: getProfilesDir — re-reads env var on every call

testsuite.name: loadCustomProfiles — reads from ORAGER_PROFILES_DIR on each call (T-gap1)

testcase.name: returns empty object for a non-existent directory
testcase.classname: loadCustomProfiles — reads from ORAGER_PROFILES_DIR on each call (T-gap1)

testcase.name: loads profiles from ORAGER_PROFILES_DIR when set
testcase.classname: loadCustomProfiles — reads from ORAGER_PROFILES_DIR on each call (T-gap1)

testcase.name: changing ORAGER_PROFILES_DIR between calls reads from the new directory (no cache)
testcase.classname: loadCustomProfiles — reads from ORAGER_PROFILES_DIR on each call (T-gap1)

testcase.name: ignores files that are not .json/.yaml/.yml
testcase.classname: loadCustomProfiles — reads from ORAGER_PROFILES_DIR on each call (T-gap1)

testcase.name: skips profile files missing required fields (description, appendSystemPrompt)
testcase.classname: loadCustomProfiles — reads from ORAGER_PROFILES_DIR on each call (T-gap1)
